hero.art_prompt: Aditya, a 23 year old Indian commerce graduate man in smart-casual, confident and hopeful, studying advanced accounts on a laptop at home, aspirational mood.

panels.narration: Aditya finished his B.Com and wanted to go further.
panels.img_prompt: Aditya, 23, at a laptop reviewing advanced accounts, ambitious and focused, tidy home.

panels.narration: A campus M.Com clashed with his job and plans.
panels.dialogue: Can I study and still work?
panels.img_prompt: Aditya looking thoughtful, glancing between work files and a laptop, modern room.

panels.narration: Then he found a recognised M.Com he could do online.
panels.img_prompt: Aditya's face lighting up at a laptop showing a 100% online M.Com, warm glow, cosy home study corner.

panels.narration: He enrolled and deepened his expertise.
panels.img_prompt: Aditya confidently starting his first M.Com lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An Online M.Com Just Works
points: Go deeper: advanced accounting, finance, taxation and research, fully online.
Options integrated with ACCA (UK) and CPA (US) for a global professional edge.
₹90,000 for the full 2-year M.Com (₹45,000/year), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ M.Com, recognised for jobs, teaching and further study.

testimonials.name: Aditya Rao
testimonials.quote: My B.Com opened the door. The M.Com made me the finance expert my role needed.

testimonials.name: Kavya Menon
testimonials.quote: The ACCA-integrated option gave my M.Com a genuine global edge.

testimonials.name: Rohit Shah
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI and online classes let me study while working full time.

testimonials.name: Sara Thomas
testimonials.quote: A recognised M.Com plus real skills moved me into a senior finance role.
